subject: An animated chandelier with a skull-like face and glowing orange eyes, chains dripping from its arms, hovering in a cavernous interior; two humanoid figures cower in the lower-left foreground
description: A large ornate chandelier dominates the composition, its candle-arms terminating in glowing orange flames and its central body forming a leering skull face with ember-bright eyes. Long crystalline or wax drip formations hang like tendrils from its frame, and chains extend outward. The chamber around it is a cavernous amber-toned interior — tall stone pillars dimly visible on the right, the ceiling arching overhead. In the lower-left corner two small humanoid figures huddle and recoil, silhouetted against the chandelier's overwhelming glow. The entire palette is warm amber, burnt orange, and deep shadow.
foreground: Two cowering humanoid figures in partial shadow
background: Cavernous stone interior with tall pillars, warm orange ambient glow
emotion: predatory leer from the chandelier; terror and cowering from the figures below
